lotDescription: A neat adobe bungalow tucked a few streets behind Desert Willow Clinic. The doctor lives alone but keeps the place orderly and welcoming — the kind of home that smells faintly of mint tea and books. The desert light filters through pale curtains, softening every edge.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: A calm, uncluttered space with desert-colored walls and a few personal touches — a stack of medical journals beside a guitar, a couch that looks more sat-on than slept in.

items.itemDescription: Simple gray fabric, comfortable but showing wear.
Stacked with medical journals, a ceramic mug, and a small potted plant.
Holds a mix of novels, anatomy texts, and desert field guides.
Used occasionally on quiet evenings; slightly out of tune.
Tall floor lamp with warm light.
A snapshot of the medical school graduating class.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Compact and efficient, with everything neatly labeled. The counter holds a kettle and an empty fruit bowl. The fridge hums softly.

items.itemDescription: Contains leftovers, bottled water, and small containers labeled by day.
Gas burners spotless, rarely used except for heating soup.
Used daily to make mint tea.
Lined with mugs, rice, and canned soup.
Small dining nook near the window, usually covered in notes or unopened mail.
Quiet ticking fills the kitchen during late nights.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Clean and minimalist — a small sanctuary after long days at the clinic. The bed is always neatly made, the air faintly scented with eucalyptus.

items.itemDescription: Simple bed with gray sheets and a folded blanket at the foot.
Holds a lamp, a half-read novel, and a box of earplugs.
Contains a handful of pressed shirts and one white lab coat.
Tall, thin mirror beside the door.
Set to go off fifteen minutes earlier than necessary.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Brightly tiled, surprisingly cheerful. Everything is in its place — toothbrush, razor, and a half-empty bottle of eucalyptus shampoo.

items.itemDescription: Porcelain basin, spotless.
Tiled, with a small shelf of travel-sized products.
Contains aspirin, floss, and a small bottle of cologne.
Half-full, clothes neatly folded inside.
Two towels, one white and one blue.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: A quiet workspace lined with papers and reference books. The desk faces a window that overlooks the desert. Sometimes, Dr. Lin falls asleep here while charting notes.

items.itemDescription: Covered with paperwork, a laptop, and a mug ring stain.
Ergonomic but creaky.
Open to highlighted pages on cardiology and anatomy.
Labeled folders for clinic finances and continuing education.
A single jade plant on the windowsill, thriving in the dry light.

outdoorSpaces.spaceDescription: A small gravel lot with a desert willow tree and a narrow path leading to the porch. The mailbox leans slightly, and the porch light hums faintly at dusk.

items.itemDescription: Provides shade and drops thin seed pods on the ground.
Stone path leading to the front door, swept clean.
Buzzes when switched on, attracts small moths.
Small metal box, slightly dented.
Plain and well-used.

outdoorSpaces.spaceDescription: A modest concrete patio with two folding chairs and a string of old lights. Dr. Lin sometimes sits out here late, listening to the wind.

items.itemDescription: Metal frame with faded canvas seats.
Half the bulbs burned out, but still pretty when lit.
Assorted small plants arranged neatly on the ledge.
Holds a glass, book, and sometimes a teacup.
Wooden, leading out to an alley that runs behind the houses.
